Tooling · Machinery · Spare Parts

For those concerned with efficiency and high productivity.

Since 1987, Tritools & Machinery has supplied the timber industries of South East Asia — plywood, particleboard, MDF and woodworking factories — with the tools, machinery and parts that keep production running.

BLD 2000

Protimeter moisture meters

Graphite Canvas

‘TTT’ HD abrasive belts

Honing Stone

Stones & finishing wheels

Welcome

A trusted name in timber-industry supply across South East Asia.

Tritools & Machinery Pte Ltd was established in 1987. From a humble beginning of five personnel, it has grown into a mature company employing a total of 46 people across three countries.

We are a stockist and supplier of tooling, machinery and spare parts, catering to the requirements of the timber industries throughout the region. Our forte is supplying plywood-producing factories, particleboard mills, medium-density fibreboard mills and woodworking factories.

More recently we formed a new division for palm-oil fruit harvesting, introducing the motorised Mori Oil Palm Fruit Harvester to greatly improve productivity over manual harvesting.

1987Established

What’s new

New machinery & palm-oil divisions

We’ve added new items and formed two new divisions — a Machinery Division and a Palm Oil Division — to serve a wider range of production needs.

Five divisions, one supplier

Everything the timber line needs, under one roof.

Tell us what your mill needs.

Send the specifics and our team will source, quote or advise — usually within one working day.

About Us

Company profile

Tritools & Machinery Pte Ltd was established in 1987. From a humble beginning of five personnel, it has grown into a mature company employing a total of 46 people, spanning three countries. We are a stockist and supplier of tooling, machinery and spare parts for the timber industries throughout South East Asia — plywood-producing factories, particleboard mills, medium-density fibreboard mills and woodworking factories.

Our structure

Tritools is organised into five divisions.

Our Products

Tooling, instruments, parts & machinery.

We are agents and stockists for trusted principals worldwide. Browse by category below — for exact specifications, models or availability, send us an enquiry.

Plywood & Veneer Machinery

Authorised agent & distributor — Plantation Resources Enterprise Pte Ltd

We specialise in plywood machinery for veneer and plywood production using small-diameter logs. Used machinery also available on an ad-hoc basis.
